prompt: Turn each message in ‘Slack’ into a little chat-bubble.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the main chat conversation area, convert each individual message block into a chat bubble. For every message, including those marked 'This message is hidden', create a rounded rectangular bubble. This bubble should enclose the message content, have a distinct background color to visually separate it from the chat background, and include a small triangular tail on its left side pointing towards the sender's avatar. Ensure all original text, emojis, and associated elements within each message remain clearly visible inside their new bubble forms.
objects: Distinctly colored background for chat bubbles
Small triangular tails on the left side of chat bubbles
Reply counts and "This message is hidden" text and links
